greeting.subtitle: Ask anything about the course materials.

chat.disclaimerBefore: Messages and relevant course-material excerpts are sent to Cerebras for AI inference. Responses may be inaccurate; verify with course materials. See

message.sourceUnavailable: Source content not available for viewing

feedback.dialogTitle: What was wrong with this response?
feedback.dialogDescription: Pick the option that fits best. Your comment is optional but helps your teacher understand the issue.

aegis.modeToggleHint: How well do you know this subject? Beginner: Aegis goes lenient on jargon and context. Expert: Aegis expects precise terms, named constraints, and what you've already tried. Click to toggle.
aegis.modeForcedHint: This study locks Aegis to its expert calibration so all participants run under the same rubric. The setting can't be changed during the study.
aegis.historyEmptyBody: Once you send a prompt, the suggestions Aegis showed for it will appear here so you can look back at them.

banner.title_one: Aegis has 1 idea for your prompt
banner.title_other: Aegis has {{count}} ideas for your prompt
banner.idleHintReview: Open Review to pick which ideas to fold in and preview the rewrite before sending.
banner.blockedHint: Press Send again to send as-is, or open Review to fold the ideas in first.
banner.trayInstruction: Pick the ideas you want to fold in. Aegis will show a preview of the rewrite; nothing is sent until you press Send.
banner.previewNeedsAnswers: Pick an answer for each idea before previewing the rewrite.

intercept.title: Aegis has a couple of ideas first
intercept.body: Take a look before you send. You can revise your draft, or send it as-is.

privacy.bannerText: Before sending messages, please review how Minerva handles your data.
